title: Homeward Bound
description: Simple /home, /back and /spawn commands, with OPTIONAL LuckPerms and Combat Timer support
body:
**Features:** 1. **/home Command:** Instantly teleport to your spawn point with a simple command. 2. **/back Command:** Instantly teleport back to your place of last death. 3. **/spawn Command:** Set your spawn wherever you are. 4. **Optional LuckPerms Support:** Seamlessly integrate with LuckPerms to manage permissions and access control in your Minecraft server. 5. **Optional [Combat Timer](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-timer/) Support:** Maintain balance and fairness in PvP environments with optional combat timer support. Set cooldown periods for teleportation commands after engaging in combat, ensuring strategic gameplay and preventing abuse of teleportation during PvP.

Spoiler These are the following permissions used for each command

- **/home** command: homeward.back
- **/back** command: homeward.back
- **/spawn** command: homeward.spawn
The requirement of permissions is disabled by default. You can enable them in the Config.
Alternatively, if you don't want to mess with permissions and just disable a specific command for everyone, that option is made available to you in the Config.
*Compatible with Minecraft versions 1.20.1+, compatible with [Combat Timer](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-timer/)*
